errors.evidence: The assistant states "Based on confirmation from available information about the 2022 Washington Metro layout... (as provided by our search_agent)" despite the search_agent never returning any actual station or stop data.
errors.description: The assistant fabricated responses from the search_agent without any real output, inventing station names and stop counts.

errors.evidence: The assistant invoked the python_interpreter tool to format and send a task to the search_agent instead of directly calling the search_agent tool or function.
errors.description: Wrong tool was selected for requesting external information; the python_interpreter was used instead of the intended search_agent tool.

errors.evidence: The code block for calling the search_agent ends with ``` instead of including the required `<end_code>` tag.
errors.description: The assistant failed to follow the specified code formatting convention by omitting the mandatory `<end_code>` marker at the end of the code block.

errors.evidence: The assistant printed the task for the search_agent but never processed or parsed any returned data before moving on to derive its final answer.
errors.description: Subtask coordination was mishandled: the assistant did not capture or integrate the search_agent response, yet proceeded to generate the final answer.

scores.reliability_reasoning: Critical information was hallucinated and tools were misused, making the output unreliable.
scores.security_reasoning: No security issues were detected; the assistant avoided unsafe operations.
scores.instruction_adherence_reasoning: The assistant did not comply with code formatting instructions and mis-invoked tools.
scores.plan_opt_reasoning: The execution deviated from the planned verification steps and did not optimally retrieve or validate data.
